item.title: Nothing against the tradition, just help me with my family event doomscrolling please!
item.description: Not even asking for a full dump, just 10, a nugget if you will. Keeping it a nice mix of tradition and memery so that neither goes unused/unnoticed and my grandmother doesn't think I'm on Tinder when scrolling through the holidays with my family.
item.dc:creator: ehsteve12

item.title: This time of year, peace is an option. Even for geese
item.description: Happy Holidays my weird, anonymous family! MV Edit: I truly appreciate this community. Endless wit and the perfect distraction! Be well imgur :)
item.dc:creator: SugarTeet

item.title: Some mental illness and neurodivergent memes
item.description:
I haven't been doing well, and this time of year, maybe others aren't either.
It's been a terrible year personally in addition to the mess of a world we live in.
And now I'm stuck at home with Covid, with nothing to get me through but the internet and my own thoughts.
So join me in laughing through the darkness today
While white-knuckling onto the incredibly faint hope that tomorrow could be better.
Happy solstice, folks! In case you need to hear it, I appreciate you and I'm happy you are here.
item.dc:creator: ThisIsMyMegaron

item.title: And it happend again. For the 9th time this year.
item.description: https://www.eurogamer.net/war-thunder-players-leak-military-documents-on-forums-again. TL:Dr; On 12th December, a user posted a manual for the M2A2 Bradley infantry fighting vehicle on the War Thunder forums. Making it the 9th time someone leaked classified/restrictred info.
item.dc:creator: cosonfused

item.title: Your fault, Imgur
item.description: Way back in 2020, I wrote a little article here on Imgur about what I thought was an interesting subject - those African-Americans who, during the War of 1812 (1812-1815), fled from American slaveowners to find their freedom with raiding British forces. Amongst those refugees, roughly 1000 men became a unique military force in British history - the "Colonial Marines" - part of the Royal Marines. This radically changed the British attacks on the American coasts of Virginia, Maryland and Georgia, and is a forgotten reason for the ability of a small British force, with no cavalry and limited artillery, to advance inland and burn Washington DC. But the story doesn't end there, as the war came to an inconclusive end, British leaders were considering creating, arming and supporting a 'black Republic' on the territory of the US (most likely Georgia) only terminated by the sudden end of the war. Colonial Marines also fought for Britain on border between Georgia and Florida - then a Spanish possession - eventually forming a unique Afro-Native American community on the Apalachicola that, after the war, was destroyed by an illegal American incursion into Spanish territory in the hope of extinguishing a 'magnet' for escaped slaves across the southern states of the United States. I thoroughly enjoyed researching this topic, and wrote many new articles on Imgur over the following years as more & more incredible facts were found - the enslaved lesbian couple from Maryland who escaped to Nova Scotia, the incredible emancipation speech of Royal Marine Colonel Nicolls ("we will unrivet the chains!"), the romantic 'private joke' of a formerly enslaved couple who joked to an American visitor about who had escaped first, the post-war settling of the Colonial Marines on Trinidad - a British colony where slavery was still practiced with concerns about a militarily-trained new community of free black people were waved aside by a dictatorial governor, the African-Americans who were offered freedom if they defended New Orleans from the British - but were afterwards returned to bondage... and so much more. My book on this incredible subject will come out in April 2024 in the UK, and June 2024 in the United States. Thank you Imgur and Imgurians, you sharpened my pen, wit, and eye, allowing me to achieve something I never anticipated. UK Amazon: https://www.amazon.co.uk/Black-Redcoats-Colonial-Marines-1814-1816/dp/1399034014 US Amazon: https://www.amazon.com/Black-Redcoats-Colonial-Marines-1814-1816/dp/1399034014
item.dc:creator: BodicaRexVII

item.title: It's meme dump day ... Again... Vol 90
item.description:
Happy winter solstice friends. Hope you are enjoying the Longest Night, or at least anticipating the return of the sun.
It's barely a secret anyway
Me right now, stuck in a weird head space.
This, so much. You are you, and that's enough of a reason
I was meant to be a cat
Ahhh my lovely birth month.
Someday I'll have my house with a mossy yard in the middle of a forest. I'll keep dreaming about it til then.
It's really the best cuz then you're like....
Mmhm
.
Or at least make you laugh at all your bad feelings
.
Meeeeeee but also I just like big words cuz language is fun
Just Cat Things
This is why I went from speed reading through novels to looking at memes. Fuck.
Seriously what was this about? Why were people making fun of men for grooming lol
.
Some evidence*
Laying on the floor listening to the album and reading the lyrics? Prime
"Fuck you gonna do?" Hobbes, probably.
Only some kinds of crimes. For legal purposes this is a joke and I totally don't commit crimes.
;)
Birding is probably good for the soul. Ask @CodyBurkett
Yeah, definitely.
I don't know but it's probably important somehow.
This makes me laugh so hard every time I see it.
.
Eyy this is why I stopped doing photography for money. But boy I miss the money.
This movie was scary as shit. I loved it and I'm not that into horror.
My kid just says "okay!" As he continues to do the fucking thing.
Yes. And I better find it cuz it's Christmas. Yikes.
I love this way of thinking. I hope this helps someone else.
All the damn time.
I mean look at them.
.
Ok look I know he's morally reprehensible but that evil lair though.
This is what it felt like for me growing up.
Stupid bullshit is what that is.
Damn.
Just because I'm being stupid doesn't mean you should be
I haaaaaate this.
Sitting outside in the gentle breeze is good times though
.
Warmth is kindness.
I say this all the time and it never gets any laughs
I just got the worst shitty stuff I've had since fucking high school. What is a good way to use some schwaggy weed, y'all? I'm not clever at this stuff.
Well....
THT tax
Trippy Kitty tax
Hobbes sneaking into my dresser and fuzzing all over my clothes tax

item.dc:creator: loadingartist

item.title: It's my 9th cakeday... here, I guess?
item.description:
It's my 9th Cakeday with you glorious bastards apparently so here is one of the first things I ever favourited (not the first as I still don't know how to repost an entire image dump). I can attest to the recipe though, I have tried it, it's absolutely amaze-balls.
Cat tax, Sylvie hard at work making some biscuits for me. Note her eye is fine, she had a little scratch which is why she's got it squeezed shut.
Super chill kitty. Anyway, it's been rad y'all. I'll probably still be here in another 9 years lol.
item.dc:creator: MalaphorMadness

item.title: Good boy
item.description: He didn't go missing
item.dc:creator: Cyberball2073

item.title: I graduated with my Associate of Science in Natural Science!!!
item.description:
My Dad was my science buddy. We did astronomy and chemistry and physics together. I am so proud that I achieved this, and I’m sure my Dad is proud of me, too.
That’s me. Filled with joy. All the time, haha!
My Physics professor and my youngest. He was a MASSIVE support this year. I made an A in Physics this semester, and he gets a lot of credit for giving me SO much time.
My bestie!
❤️
I’m a scientist now, so my kids made scientist cookies and this one is me! Long dark hair, green eyes, a lab coat with pins, and low top Chuck Taylor shoes!
We are the Ducks!
A better picture of my cap. Dinosaurs. A picture of my dad, Joe Fred, and the Orion constellation! Thank you guys for being part of my support system through this journey. I begin my university journey in January!! ❤️??✨
item.dc:creator: chickensareawesome
